rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ROBERT E. ANDERSON LIVING TRUST DATED MARCH 17, 2001
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Subpoena For Bank Records
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Thursday, January 22, 2009. 1) Defendants Anderson, Huey, and Greenfield's motion to quash subpoena for bank records. The motion is ordered off calendar as there is no proof of service of the motion. In addition, the motion is moot in light of the ruling concerning petitioner's motion to compel compliance with said subpoena. = (BEC/610)

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ROBERT E. ANDERSON LIVING TRUST DATED MARCH 17, 2001
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Order Directing Compliance With Subpoena And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions; Points And Auth. Decl. Of Terrance Heath
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Thursday, January 22, 2009. 3) Petitioner Samuel Anderson's motion to compel compliance with subpoena directed to Bank of West. Granted in part. The subpoenas are modified to only require production of records from January 1, 2004 to December 31, 2007 that reflect activity relating to plaintiffs, defendants, Robert E. Anderson, and / or the Robert E. Anderson Living Trust. All requests for monetary sanctions are denied. = (BEC/610)

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ROBERT E. ANDERSON LIVING TRUST DATED MARCH 17, 2001
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Order Compelling The Production Of Documents.
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Thursday, January 22, 2009. 2) Petitioner Samuel Anderson's motion to compel production of documents as to defendant Willette Huey. Granted = (BEC/610)
